---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for OBS Studio
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Use Case
Describe the specific use case or scenario where this feature would be useful.

## Proposed Solution
If you have ideas on how this feature could be implemented, describe them here.

## Alternatives Considered
A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here.

## Would you be willing to implement this feature?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this feature
- [ ] I can help with testing
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting
